title: Trollhättan Heavy Rain
lead: Trollhättan is experiencing extreme heavy rain with a Z-Score of -3.20. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heavy rain in Trollhättan is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The high humidity of 93% and low wind speed of 4.7 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The HDD of 12.2 GG and CDD of 0.0 GG indicate a substantial impact on heating and energy demand.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain in Trollhättan.
agri_impact: Crop damage likely due to flooding
